problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
